title: Dark Mode Sandstone
description: Makes sand based blocks about 75% darker
body:
Literally just makes sand and sandstone about 75% darker so that my eyes can catch a break while I'm building a mega base in a desert.

I'm pretty sure it should work for all 1.14+ versions but I'm to lazy to test it out myself and I just know enough random stuff to be confident in my previous statement.

If it says "Incompatible Version" or something like that just ignore it. It will most likely work still.

Fully supports Optifine (ctm).
